load-pdf-enumerate-acroform-fields.title: Load PDF and Enumerate AcroForm Fields
load-pdf-enumerate-acroform-fields.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, accessing its AcroForm, and iterating over form fields to read basic information such as field name, type, and text box value.

read-acroform-fields-from-pdf-stream.title: Read AcroForm Fields from PDF Stream
read-acroform-fields-from-pdf-stream.description: Shows how to open a PDF as a read‑only stream and enumerate its AcroForm fields using Aspose.Pdf without saving the file to disk.

retrieve-acroform-fields-from-pdf.title: Retrieve All AcroForm Fields from a PDF
retrieve-acroform-fields-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF document, accesses its AcroForm, and enumerates all form fields, printing each field's full name and current value.

retrieve-pdf-form-field-by-name.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field by Name
retrieve-pdf-form-field-by-name.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm, and retrieve a specific form field using the Form indexer.

iterate-pdf-pages-list-form-fields.title: Iterate PDF Pages to List Form Fields
iterate-pdf-pages-list-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through each page, retrieve the form fields in tab order, and output each field's name and concrete type.

enumerate-pdf-form-fields-on-page.title: Enumerate PDF Form Fields on a Specific Page
enumerate-pdf-form-fields-on-page.description: Loads a PDF document, selects a given page, and logs each form field’s name, type, and value.

read-checkbox-value-to-boolean.title: Read Checkbox Value and Convert to Boolean
read-checkbox-value-to-boolean.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, accessing its form fields, reading the Value property of a checkbox, and converting that string to a Boolean indicating whether the box is checked.

parse-number-field-to-decimal.title: Parse Number Field Value to Decimal
parse-number-field-to-decimal.description: Demonstrates how to read a numeric form field from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, convert its value to a decimal with invariant culture, and perform calculations on the parsed number.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, export all form fields to a JSON string, and output the result to the console.

save-json-data-to-utf8-file.title: Save JSON Data to UTF-8 File
save-json-data-to-utf8-file.description: Shows how to write a JSON string to a file on disk using UTF‑8 encoding with File.WriteAllText.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
export-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and export its form fields to an XML file using the Document.SaveXml method.

export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, binding it to the Facade Form class, and exporting the form fields to an FDF file using a FileStream.

export-acroform-fields-to-xfdf.title: Export AcroForm Fields to XFDF
export-acroform-fields-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates exporting AcroForm fields (annotations) from a PDF to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf's ExportAnnotationsToXfdf method with a FileStream.

export-pdf-to-pdf-html-streams.title: Export PDF to PDF, HTML, and Streams with Proper FileStream Disposal
export-pdf-to-pdf-html-streams.description: Demonstrates saving an Aspose.Pdf Document as a PDF file, as HTML, and into FileStream objects, including per‑page PDF stream export, while ensuring streams are closed via using blocks.

modify-checkbox-appearance.title: Modify Checkbox Appearance and Read Its Value
modify-checkbox-appearance.description: Shows how to change a checkbox's visual style, color, border, and export value using Aspose.PDF, then retrieve its checked state and save the updated PDF.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Files
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Iterates through PDF files in a folder, loads each document with Aspose.Pdf, and exports its form fields to a JSON file with the same base name.

combine-pdf-form-data-to-json-array.title: Combine PDF Form Data into a Single JSON Array
combine-pdf-form-data-to-json-array.description: The example loads several PDF files, extracts their form fields as JSON using Aspose.Pdf, and merges the individual JSON objects into one JSON array for batch processing.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and export its interactive form fields to a JSON file using the Document.Form.ExportToJson method.

extract-pdf-form-text-with-logging.title: Extract PDF Form Text with Start/End Logging
extract-pdf-form-text-with-logging.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, extract text from form XObjects on each page, and log the start and end timestamps of the extraction run.

serialize-pdf-form-data-to-json-bytes.title: Serialize PDF Form Data to JSON Bytes
serialize-pdf-form-data-to-json-bytes.description: Loads a PDF, extracts its form fields as JSON into a memory stream, and returns the JSON content as a byte array for API consumption.

export-filtered-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export Filtered PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-filtered-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: The example opens a PDF, selects form fields whose names start with a given prefix, extracts their values, and writes the filtered collection to a JSON file.

count-acroform-fields-in-pdf.title: Count AcroForm Fields in PDF
count-acroform-fields-in-pdf.description: Loads a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and retrieves the total number of AcroForm fields using the Form.Count property.

iterate-fill-pdf-form-fields.title: Iterate and Fill PDF Form Fields
iterate-fill-pdf-form-fields.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all form fields using a foreach loop, sets values based on field type, and saves the updated document.

retrieve-runtime-types-of-pdf-form-field.title: Retrieve Runtime Types of PDF Form Fields
retrieve-runtime-types-of-pdf-form-field.description: Loads a PDF document, accesses its form collection, and prints each field's name along with its runtime type using the GetType() method.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v3.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON Stream
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v3.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF, creating a FileStream, and exporting all form fields directly to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf's ExportToJson method with optional formatting options.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML Using MemoryStream
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates its form fields, and writes each field's name, type, and value to an XML document stored in a MemoryStream.

export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF Using Aspose.Pdf
export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document, bind it to the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form facade, and export the form fields to an FDF file using a FileStream that is automatically closed.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Using a FileStream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating a FileStream, and exporting all annotations (including form fields) to an XFDF file via Document.ExportAnnotationsToXfdf, with proper resource disposal.

log-form-field-count-per-pdf-page.title: Log Form Field Count per PDF Page
log-form-field-count-per-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through its pages, and logging the total number of form fields for each page iteration.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF to Individual SVG Files
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and extract each vector graphic as a separate SVG file using SvgExtractor.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg__v2.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG Files
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, select a specific page, and extract each vector graphic on that page as separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-combine-vector-graphics-pdf-to-s.title: Extract and Combine Vector Graphics from PDF into Multi‑Page SVG
extract-combine-vector-graphics-pdf-to-s.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to extract vector graphics from each page of a PDF with SvgExtractor and merge them into a single multi‑page SVG document.

export-pdf-subpaths-as-png.title: Export PDF Subpaths as Individual PNG Images
export-pdf-subpaths-as-png.description: Shows how to capture each SubPath on PDF pages using GraphicsAbsorber and render each one to a separate PNG file.

export-pdf-page-as-png.title: Export PDF Page as PNG Image at Specified DPI
export-pdf-page-as-png.description: Shows how to rasterize a PDF page into a PNG file using Aspose.Pdf with a custom resolution (DPI).

extract-single-graphic-element-as-svg.title: Extract Single Graphic Element as SVG from PDF
extract-single-graphic-element-as-svg.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use Aspose.Pdf.Vector.SvgExtractor to get vector graphic elements from a page, pick one by index, and save it as an SVG file.

extract-first-page-text-to-utf8-file.title: Extract First Page Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
extract-first-page-text-to-utf8-file.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the text of the first page using a TextAbsorber, and save the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-txt.title: Extract Text from PDF to TXT using Aspose.Pdf
extract-text-from-pdf-to-txt.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all page text using TextAbsorber, and write the concatenated result to a .txt file.

extract-pdf-stamp-texts-to-json.title: Extract PDF Stamp Annotation Texts to JSON
extract-pdf-stamp-texts-to-json.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and annotations, extracts the text content of each StampAnnotation, and writes the collected strings to a JSON file.

extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript from PDF with Annotations
extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to detect superscript and subscript characters in a PDF by analyzing font size and baseline offsets, and annotates them in a plain‑text output file.

extract-paragraphs-from-pdf.title: Extract Paragraphs from PDF Preserving Line Breaks
extract-paragraphs-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to absorb the logical paragraph structure of each page, iterate through sections and lines, and write the extracted text to a .txt file while keeping original line breaks.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's image resources, and save each embedded image as a PNG file in an output folder.

extract-embedded-fonts-from-pdf.title: Extract Embedded Fonts from PDF and Save as TTF
extract-embedded-fonts-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieving all embedded fonts, and exporting each font to a .ttf file in a specified directory.

extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.title: Extract PDF Tables to Separate CSV Files
extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF, convert each table's rows and cells to CSV format, and save each table as an individual CSV file.

export-pdf-acroform-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF AcroForm Fields to JSON
export-pdf-acroform-fields-to-json.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all AcroForm field names and values, and writes them to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
batch-extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Shows how to scan a folder of PDF files, detect pages that contain vector graphics, and save each page's graphics as an SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

parallel-pdf-text-extraction.title: Parallel PDF Text Extraction Using TPL
parallel-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from multiple PDF files concurrently with the Task Parallel Library, storing results in a thread‑safe collection.

export-pdf-to-svg-with-dpi-and-css.title: Export PDF to SVG with DPI Scaling and Custom CSS
export-pdf-to-svg-with-dpi-and-css.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to SVG with DPI‑like scaling, extracting vector graphics per page, and injecting custom CSS styling into the generated SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-large-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract Large Graphics from PDF as SVG
extract-large-graphics-to-svg.description: Demonstrates how to collect graphic elements from each PDF page, filter them by bounding‑box area, and export the qualifying graphics as separate SVG files.

extract-graphics-from-specific-pdf-pages.title: Extract Graphics from Specific PDF Pages to SVG
extract-graphics-from-specific-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF, select given page numbers, collect graphic elements with GraphicsAbsorber, and save them as SVG files using SvgExtractor.

combine-pdf-vectors-to-svg.title: Combine Vector Graphics from Multiple PDFs into a Single SVG
combine-pdf-vectors-to-svg.description: The example loads several PDF files, extracts vector graphics from each page using Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor, and merges the resulting SVG fragments into one multi‑page SVG document.

export-pdf-subpaths-to-svg.title: Export PDF Subpaths to Separate SVG Files
export-pdf-subpaths-to-svg.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, configure SVG extraction to treat each subpath as an individual graphic, and save each subpath as a separate SVG file with a transparent background.

extract-vector-graphics-from-encrypted-p.title: Extract Vector Graphics from Encrypted PDF to SVG
extract-vector-graphics-from-encrypted-p.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF by providing a password, decrypting it, and saving its vector graphics as a single SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg__v3.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF to SVG Preserving Coordinates
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg__v3.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save any vector graphics on each page as SVG files while preserving the original PDF coordinate system.

pdf-summary-report.title: Generate PDF Summary Report with Image, Graphic, and Text Statistics
pdf-summary-report.description: The example loads each PDF in a folder, extracts total text length, counts images and vector graphics per page, and writes a CSV summary report.

extract-pdf-statistics-fonts-tables-form.title: Extract Font, Table, and Form Field Statistics from PDF
extract-pdf-statistics-fonts-tables-form.description: Shows how to load PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, count distinct fonts, AcroForm fields, and tables from tagged content, and log the statistics for each document.

validate-pdf-fonts-against-system.title: Validate PDF Fonts Against System Installed Fonts
validate-pdf-fonts-against-system.description: The example opens a PDF, iterates through all referenced fonts on each page, and reports any fonts that are not installed on the host system.

extract-pdf-metadata-to-svg.title: Extract PDF Metadata and Convert to SVG Vector Graphics
extract-pdf-metadata-to-svg.description: Opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reads the author and title from the document info, and saves the document as an SVG to preserve vector graphics.

extract-images-from-pdf-using-graphicsab.title: Extract Images from PDF Using GraphicsAbsorber and Save as JPEG
extract-images-from-pdf-using-graphicsab.description: The example opens a PDF, uses GraphicsAbsorber to locate image graphic elements, renders each page to a bitmap, crops the image regions, and saves them as high‑resolution JPEG files.

convert-pdf-to-markdown-preserve-indenta.title: Convert PDF to Markdown Preserving Paragraph Indentation
convert-pdf-to-markdown-preserve-indenta.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and saving it as a formatted Markdown file while keeping the original paragraph indentation.

extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf__.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript Text from PDF
extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf__.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, use a TextFragmentAbsorber with pure formatting extraction, and identify fragments that are superscript or subscript, outputting them with Unicode markers.

export-pdf-tables-to-csv-with-visual-bor.title: Export PDF Tables to CSV with Visual Cell Borders
export-pdf-tables-to-csv-with-visual-bor.description: Demonstrates how to extract tables from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber and write them to a CSV file while preserving visual cell borders with delimiter markers.

extract-checkbox-states-to-json.title: Extract Checkbox States from PDF AcroForm to JSON
extract-checkbox-states-to-json.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its AcroForm fields, collects the checked state of each checkbox, and outputs the results as a JSON boolean array.

extract-selected-radio-button-values.title: Extract Selected Radio Button Values from PDF Form
extract-selected-radio-button-values.description: Loads a PDF, iterates its form fields, identifies radio button groups and retrieves the label of the selected option for each group.

extract-pdf-vector-graphics-recolor.title: Extract PDF Vector Graphics and Recolor to Brand Palette
extract-pdf-vector-graphics-recolor.description: Loads a PDF, extracts each page's vector graphics as SVG, replaces fill and stroke colors with a specified brand color, and saves the transformed SVG files.

extract-pdf-form-fields.title: Extract PDF Form Field Names and Values
extract-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate its form fields, and return a dictionary mapping each field's full name to its current string value.
